actions.value:
Edge does not have access to any of your order information.

For MoonPay related inquires, please submit a support request, here: https://support.moonpay.com/hc/en-gb/requests/new - They are relatively quick with their replies.

 

For questions regarding MoonPay's services, you can call  888-651-0727, Mon - Fri (9am - 5pm ET)

 

Or you can email support@moonpay.com
